_doc: Parameters for LCI estimation. QoS weights follow the paper. The phi aggregator uses threshold-normalized sub-functions (=1 at/above target, <1 below): alpha=min(1,a/abar), rho=min(1,(1-qbar)/(1-q)), sigma=min(1,(1-sbar)/(1-s)), lambda=softplus hinge; phi=prod(sub^eta). Operational q,s, decode rates, and token counts are documented ASSUMPTIONS, not sourced. Service-time SCV<1 reflects near-deterministic LLM decode for fixed output length (the M/M/k validation in validate_queue.py uses SCV=1 separately).
_latency_note: latency_target_ms are full-completion p95 SLOs for throughput/batch-oriented serving of 70B (not interactive TTFT); tens-of-seconds reflect full generation of 150-300 output tokens at 22-50 tok/s.
